history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, low-angle selfie of a young Asian man. His dark, spiky hair appears wet and styled upwards. He has prominent eyebrows, dark eyes, and a light mustache and goatee. The man is wearing a pink t-shirt with thin white horizontal stripes. The background is slightly out of focus, showing a light-colored wall and a ceiling with a wooden beam. To the right, there's a glimpse of a window with green-tinted glass and a light-colored frame. The lighting is natural and appears to be from above and slightly to the side, creating soft shadows on his face. The overall mood is casual and candid.
